mapper.select: with claim_candidates as ( select top (#{limit}) t.id from patient_raw_data_collect_task t with (updlock, readpast, rowlock) where t.status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and t.available_at <= #{now} and t.attempt_count < t.max_attempts order by t.available_at asc, t.create_time asc, t.id asc ) update t set t.status = 'RUNNING', t.last_start_time = #{now}, t.update_time = #{now}, t.attempt_count = t.attempt_count + 1 output inserted.id, inserted.reqno, inserted.status, inserted.attempt_count, inserted.max_attempts, inserted.previous_source_last_time, inserted.source_last_time, inserted.change_types, inserted.available_at, inserted.last_start_time, inserted.last_finish_time, inserted.last_error_message, inserted.create_time, inserted.update_time from patient_raw_data_collect_task t inner join claim_candidates c on c.id = t.id
